seoTitle: Rocky Plain vs Rogues Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rocky Plain and Rogues Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rocky Plain vs Rogues Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rocky Plain and Rogues Point.
heading: Rocky Plain vs Rogues Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rocky Plain, South Australia and Rogues Point, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rocky Plain has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Rogues Point (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rocky Plain or Rogues Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rocky Plain has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Rogues Point scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rocky Plain scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Rogues Point scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rocky Plain or Rogues Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rocky Plain has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
